channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Private detectives investigate infidelity as divorce rates rise in Peru
item.description: In Peru, rising divorce rates are prompting an increasing number of people to hire private detectives to investigate suspected infidelity. Sergio, a 37-year-old father of two, discovered his wife’s af...

item.title: Anna of MEOVV Becomes Hada Labo’s Asia-Pacific Brand Ambassador
item.description: Anna Tanaka, a rising K-pop star and member of the group MEOVV, has been appointed as the new Asia-Pacific ambassador for the popular skincare brand Hada Labo. Known for her growing influence in the m...

item.title: Government releases P5,000 fuel aid to over 1.1 million jeepney drivers amid rising oil prices
item.description: Mahigit 1.1 milyong jeepney drivers sa buong Pilipinas ang nakatanggap ng tig-P5,000 na cash assistance mula sa gobyerno, ayon sa Department of Social Welfare and Development (DSWD). Ang tulong ay ipi...

item.title: Security Incident at White House Correspondents’ Dinner; Trump Unharmed
item.description: A security incident unfolded at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, leaving President Donald Trump unharmed. The event, held at the Hilton hotel in Washington D.C., was disrupted by an unspecified...

item.title: How Several African Countries Reformed Official Languages After Independence
item.description: Across Africa, many countries don begin shift away from colonial languages like English and French to promote their own indigenous tongues and strengthen national identity. Countries like Tanzania lea...

item.title: Secret Service Funding Shortfall Exposed During WHCA Dinner Shooting Amid DHS Stalemate
item.description: A gunman opened fire outside the White House Correspondents' Dinner at the Washington Hilton on April 25, 2026, where President Donald Trump, Cabinet members, journalists, and celebrities were gathere...

item.title: Luke Hemsworth opens up about his acting career, family dynamics and wrestling with his brothers
item.description: Luke Hemsworth, known for his roles in action films, reflects on his career and his experiences as part of the famous Hemsworth family. In a recent interview, he discusses the challenges of being comp...

item.title: Lawyer Challenges Legality of Lagos Monthly Movement Restriction for Sanitation
item.description: Senior Advocate of Nigeria, Ebun Adegboruwa, don strongly criticise Lagos State Government over the directive wey force residents to stay indoors during the monthly environmental sanitation exercise. ...

item.title: Daily Horoscope Guidance for April 26, 2026
item.description: The Globe and Mail presents the lookahead horoscope for April 26, 2026, offering guidance and insights for each zodiac sign. Those with birthdays today are advised to stay vigilant, as opportunities f...

item.title: How a shared reuse room in an apartment building built community and reduced waste
item.description: An inner-Sydney apartment complex introduced a shared reuse space, informally known as the “magic room”, where residents could leave unwanted items and pick up things they needed. Initially set up as ...

item.title: Tensions persist in Strait of Hormuz despite global push for reopening and demining efforts
item.description: The Strait of Hormuz continues to remain a major flashpoint despite ongoing diplomatic and military efforts to restore normal navigation. The crisis began after US and Israeli strikes on Iran in late ...

item.title: FG approves higher allowances, housing loans and welfare reforms for Nigerian civil servants
item.description: The Federal Government of Nigeria don approve several new measures to improve the welfare of civil servants as cost of living continues to rise across the country. According to the Office of the Head ...

item.title: Misinformation and Algorithms Fuel Outrage Over Non-Existent Crime in Epsom
item.description: A series of events in Epsom, Surrey, has highlighted the dangers of misinformation and the power of social media algorithms. Initially, police investigated a reported sexual offence, but scant details...

item.title: SWISS Flight Evacuated at Delhi Airport Following Engine Failure
item.description: In a serious incident reported early Sunday morning at the Indira Gandhi International Airport (IGIA) in Delhi, a SWISS Airlines flight scheduled for Zurich was forced to abort its takeoff. The aircra...

item.title: OMR gated communities in Chennai fail to host polling booths despite efforts
item.description: In the recent election coverage in Chennai, an unusual pattern emerged: while a few gated communities in other parts of the city functioned as polling centres, none along the Old Mahabalipuram Road (O...

item.title: Why we willingly pay for discomfort, from gym sessions to therapy
item.description: In this humorous and sharply observant column, Ndumiso Ngcobo reflects on the curious ways people willingly pay to experience pain. While he jokes about avoiding something as extreme as a bikini wax, ...

item.title: Environmental group calls for national climate emergency amid worsening drought in Luzon
item.description: Nanawagan ang environmental group na Philippine Movement for Climate Justice (PMCJ) sa pamahalaan na magdeklara ng isang national climate emergency dahil sa patuloy na lumalalang epekto ng tagtuyot sa...

item.title: U.S. Forces Redirect Sanctioned Iranian Oil Ship in Arabian Sea
item.description: On Saturday, U.S. Central Command announced that American forces intercepted a sanctioned merchant vessel in the Arabian Sea, identified as part of Iran's 'shadow fleet' recently targeted by U.S. Trea...

item.title: Family mourns tragic death of baby girl in dog attack
item.description: The family of Maggie-May Ann Moody, a three-month-old girl who tragically died following a dog attack in Dormanstown, Redcar, have expressed their profound grief. In a statement released by Cleveland ...

item.title: Police search for suspect after assault outside Thornhill synagogue leaves victim unharmed
item.description: York Regional Police are searching for a suspect following an assault that took place outside a synagogue in Thornhill, Ontario. The incident occurred on April 25, 2026, and involved a victim who was ...
